title: Personal User - update for headset is present
scenario: Software update notification appears on Home Screen for outdated firmware on connected Poly device; tapping update completes DFU process
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in as a Personal User (or proceed as Guest).
3. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has outdated firmware.
4. Observe the Home Screen for a software update notification related to the connected device.
5. Tap the update button in the notification.
6. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
expected: A software update notification appears on the Home Screen for the connected device with outdated firmware. Tapping the update button initiates and successfully completes the DFU process.
